thesis_profile.market_mechanism: v95: Phase 1d-informed lean rebuild. Trims v94's 10-factor score to ONLY the 7 factors classified 'stable' by the per-factor walk-forward IC stability diagnostic (32 expanding windows, sign_consistency >= 70%, quarter_consistency >= 70%, |IC| > 0.05, no significant decay). Two structural changes from v94 (xs_minimal_v9): (1) DROPPED 4 v94 'weak' decoration factors (sign_consistency < 70% or |IC| < 0.03): coinglass_top_trader_long_pct_smooth_5 (IC=-0.029, sign=56%), momentum_decay_5_20 (IC=-0.013, sign=47%), coinglass_taker_imb_intraday_dispersion_24h (IC=+0.023, sign=67%), quality_funding_oi (IC=-0.014, sign=59%). These contributed noise but no consistent signal across 32 walk-forward windows. (2) ADDED stress_liq_conc_iv (IC=-0.064, sign=89% — best sign-consistency in the entire 22-factor diagnostic universe), rescued from v92's discarded B-batch. Diagnostic confirmed v92 cycle failed because its 11 B-batch candidates were 1 stable + 10 noise; the noise diluted the 1 real signal. Weights are IC-proportional from the diagnostic measurements (sum |w| ~= 1.01). v93's portfolio multiplier overlay (btc_eth_max_iv_aggressive_tanh_v1) preserved in profile_constraints; applies at backtest portfolio layer, not score layer. v95 = lean v94 minus 4 noise factors plus 1 rescued stable factor plus DVOL multiplier overlay. Total factor count 10 -> 7.
thesis_profile.directional_claim: rank top-3 liquid perp-covered names by 7 WF-stable z-score factors with IC-proportional weights, then scale all positions by DVOL regime multiplier (in [0.2, 1.0]). Expected: rank IC ~0.18 (similar to v94 0.181 or slightly higher from removing noise factors), WF median sharpe ~0.95 (similar to v94 0.955; minor uplift from purer signal possible but uncertain), worst regime sharpe ~-2.7 to -2.9 (similar to v94 -2.73; multiplier overlay unchanged). Critical assumption: v94's 4 dropped factors were truly noise (per diagnostic) and didn't provide marginal signal that purer factor combination misses. v92's lesson revisited: the failure was 10 unstable B-batch candidates diluting 1 stable one; rescuing only the stable one (stress_liq_conc_iv) under WF-validated criteria should NOT replicate v92's regression. Falsification triggers rollback ONLY if: rank IC < 0.165 (v91 baseline; v95 should not regress from baseline), OR WF median sharpe < 0.80 (significant regression vs v94 0.955), OR worst regime sharpe < -2.9 (overlay broken). Strict validation gates (validation_contract.json) remain unchanged; v95 still flags 'fail' on participation cap and net-return-negative tests, same as v91-v94 baseline (no improvement on those axes expected; that requires Phase 2 portfolio construction).
thesis_profile.factor_formula: raw = -0.20*z(iv_smooth_20) +0.18*z(dh_20) +0.16*z(dh_60) +0.14*z(dh_5) -0.13*z(rv_5) -0.11*z(stress_liq_conc_iv) -0.09*z(liquidity_stress_qv_iv); final = tanh((percentile_rank(raw)-0.5)*1.80); position_multiplier_overlay = clip(1 - tanh((max(btc_dvol_z90, eth_dvol_z90) - 0.5) * 3), 0.2, 1.0) applied at portfolio sizing layer (not in raw_score)
